entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Affliction Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Cast . The reason for casting this before Curse of Agony is that it's not an instant-cast spell.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Affliction Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Channel once all DoTs are up.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Affliction Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Start channeling just before a mob dies, to proc .

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Affliction Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Cast on all targets first to prevent suffering from knockback once they reach you.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Affliction Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Cast . Combined with , this will guarantee a high amount of sustain.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Affliction Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Repeat steps 2 to 4 until you have DoTs on all targets.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Affliction Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Once DoTs are applied to all targets, you will want to use to AoE fear them.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Affliction Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Channel on the highest-HP target once all DoTs are up.

sections.heading: Leveling Rotation for Affliction Warlock DPS in Burning Crusade

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Affliction Warlock DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Resource management is the most important aspect of Warlock leveling. Thanks to , Warlocks have two resources to pull from to decrease downtime and thus maximize experience gain. To get full use out of and , make sure you keep an eye on your health and mana, and Life Tap frequently to try to maintain both resources at close to 100%.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Affliction Warlock DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: If you use , you want to keep your pets' mana-using spells off auto-cast. This will allow you to manage your pet’s mana to ensure your demon will have enough for when you want to use Dark Pact.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Affliction Warlock DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: You can buy grimoires beforehand for important spells of your pet of choice and keep them in your bags to use when leveling up. This makes it so you don't have to see a trainer if those are the only spells you really need at level up.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Affliction Warlock DPS in TBC Classic
